name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-68
title: Spec invariant 24f (conditional-priority) lists 4 priorities; current code has 5 (adds human-approval-bypass)
description: spec.md Inv 24f (line 466-471) declares 'multi-message output strategy is conditional-priority' and refers to Invariant 37 for the order. Inv 37 (line 560-569) lists FIVE priority levels (CLAUDE.md drift, surface drift, scope-guard-off, human-approval-bypass, skills-updated). But contract.md schema 'sync-check-output' priority_order field (line 36) lists only FOUR: ['CLAUDE.md-drift-or-first-run', 'surface-drift', 'scope-guard-off', 'plugins-stale']. The human-approval-bypass priority is missing from the contract schema. Also 'plugins-stale' is a stale name — the marker was renamed to .rabbit-skills-updated. contract.md must be updated to list all 5 priorities with current names.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup: bug invalid — see triage notes in tdd-report-rabbit-cage.json
